name: daisyui
tagline: Guides an agent to use daisyUI 5 components, colors, and config for all HTML/JSX generation via a structured discovery protocol.
verdict: Strong discovery protocol and thorough component index. But it forces triggering on any HTML/JSX work 'even if the user does not explicitly ask,' with no negative-trigger guidance, risking misfire outside daisyUI projects. Some mandatory referenced docs weren't verifiable here.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for'/exclusion guidance anywhere; description instead pushes universal triggering on any HTML/JSX work.
No guidance for what to do if referenced component/install/usage docs are missing or unreadable.
Description uses promotional framing ('mandatory', 'official') rather than a neutral function description.
